title: OpenGraph data not displaying due to pre-rendering setting
symptom: The OpenGraph data for the live project is not functioning as expected, leading to issues with link previews.
root_cause: When the 'Disable pre-rendering' option is enabled, the OpenGraph data may not be generated correctly, preventing it from being displayed in link previews on social media platforms.
agent_instruction: Disable the 'Disable pre-rendering' option and republish the project to restore OpenGraph functionality.
